programme.title: Airplane Repo: Two If by Air, One If by Sea
programme.desc: Ken and Danny seize a luxury yacht and the debtor comes after them full-force. Mike devises a solution to get even with the deadbeat who bought his favourite plane and stopped paying. Kevin and Heather find themselves in the middle of a mid-air nightmare.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Wounded Warbird
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey greenlights Heather Sterzick's first solo repo, but she pays the price for her mistakes. Mike Kennedy returns to his old stomping grounds in Puerto Rico to recover a relic from the old family business.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo Roulette
programme.desc: Stuntman turned Repo Pilot Mike Kennedy skydives into an airfield to snatch a Dehavilland Twin Otter airplane. Later, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson make a risky two-vehicle snatch from a wealthy playboy.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Rescue Repo
programme.desc: Super Repo Man Mike Kennedy boldly risks an emergency landing on a remote Alaskan glacier, while strongman Danny Thompson frees a $1.8-million Lear 31 from its hangar by hand.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Blood and Mud
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey ends up battered and bruised after snatching a $1 million Falcon 20 owned by a debtor he has a long, rocky history with. Mike Kennedy is called in to repo a Cessna 208 Caravan used in the illegal trafficking of exotic animals.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Dustin takes a gamble to return to a spot just above McKinley Falls for the remainder of the season, but while moving his dredge down the side a cliff, giant falling rocks threaten his life.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Rockfall Ravine
programme.desc: Fred fires his dredge back up and lands his biggest gold haul of the year. Dustin faces an uncertain future and Carlos makes a surprising discovery at the new dive site.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Performances Piece
programme.desc: Tony Danza makes his debut at the salon to help his Broadway co-star find the perfect bridal costume for her role in their new musical, 'Honeymoon in Vegas.' Ballerina Valerie wants a wedding gown that is nothing like her princess dance costumes.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Drama, Drama, Drama!
programme.desc: WyQuasia's family spends more time bickering with each other than listening to what the bride wants! Shelley's enormous entourage all have so many opinions they make dress shopping impossible. Bride Zabrina's mother demands her custom gown be redesigned.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That's How You Dress a Lady
programme.desc: Randy's runway show is finally here and it's his big opportunity to prove he's back as a bridal designer for good.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Somewhere in There Is a Foot
programme.desc: Stacy's life-threatening scar on her foot has left her hopeless, but she's giving it one last shot. David has the worst case of foot fungus Dr. Schaeffer has seen, and Morgan, an erotic paranormal romance novelist, is hoping to her sixth toe amputated.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: ET Fingers
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent tries to save a man's enormous toe, as Dr. Schaeffer has his hands full treating a little boy with big demands, and a man with incredibly long toes.

programme.desc: Ken is covered in painful bumps. Taylore is a beautiful, young woman with unsightly elf-like bumps on her ears. Jose never goes out because of the baseball-sized lump on his head.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: Operation Complication
programme.desc: Jazz is rushed into emergency surgery due to a major complication. While staying with Jazz for her recovery in New York, Jeannette learns Jack is fighting for his life in a health crisis of his own.

programme.desc: Whitney hunts for a permanent home in Charlotte. A health scare for Babs causes Whitney to take drastic measures. Meanwhile, sparks fly on Whitney and Chase's first date.

programme.desc: Alexis has searched everywhere for a certain gown, only to now find it's double her budget. Jenna's dream dress turns into a nightmare when it's $7,000 over budget. Lauren is committed to going over budget on her see-through bodice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What Does Martha Think?
programme.desc: The wedding guru herself, Martha Stewart, visits Kleinfeld. She's helping bride Bailey decide if she truly chose her perfect dress. Meanwhile, bride Jessica is so indecisive she may not find a gown, and Crystal wants impossible alterations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Cinderella Gone Wrong
programme.desc: After losing her dress in the California wildfires, Eryka comes to Kleinfeld hoping she can fall in love with a new dress. Shay helps Ashley feel sexy after losing over 100 pounds. Randy helps a desperate bride whose dress has disappeared.

programme.desc: Kanchana fears her pregnancy will push her Nepalese family away. Susannah is having a third child with a jobless husband.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Bethany/ Cecily
programme.desc: Bethany is pregnant by a guy who just got another woman pregnant too. Cecily fears her pregnancy will open old wounds.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Met My Fiance in Jail
programme.desc: With only nine weeks to go until America's wedding, Randy goes undercover to surprise a police officer and his bride-to-be.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Said Yes to the Dress, America!
programme.desc: Randy goes off the grid to surprise Sammi Jo and learns that she's anxious to go dress shopping without her mom. Raeshanda needs a dress fit for a queen for under $2000 or else it's off with their heads!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Do It With Your Boots on!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: At Perella's Ristorante in Warren, Rhode Island, Chef Robert Irvine meets an owner whose stubbornness is holding back his restaurant. He hasn't updated the menu, the decor or his opinions since the place opened 25 years ago.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Ambush: Fight to the Finish
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine is headed to New Kensington, Pa., to ambush Stacey, the owner of Stella's Dine-Inn Restaurant. Robert must work hard to help this family from being torn apart while also facing design struggles with the very large restaurant space.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Chocolate: Impossible
programme.desc: Ken opened up Cocoamoda, a French Bistro with an event space and chocolate boutique, seven years ago in the small town of Calvert, Texas. After failing to attract a following from the major cities, he's now deeply in debt.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Behind the Impossible: Saving a Family's Legacy
programme.desc: Robert Irvine comes to the rescue of Al's Seafood in Maryland, a restaurant that has been in the family for more than 60 years.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Beloved Restaurant on the Rocks
programme.desc: Robert Irvine visits Ferguson, Mo., to help a beloved community restaurant on the brink of closing its doors. The owners of Drake's Place, Sonny and Bridget, are out of both money and options. They just wish their son would step up more.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Revisited: Family Matters
programme.desc: Robert Irvine revisits So Natural Organic Restaurant and Market in Harker Heights, TX, where he met a family of seven all working nonstop to keep things afloat in 2016. It was so important for the owners to leave the legacy of the business for their kids.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Frankie's
programme.desc: Chef Robert heads to "By the Tracks," to save a 30-year-old business, purchased 13 years prior by best friends Jay and Tina. The stress of owning a failing business had been corroding their relationship and putting their friendship to the test.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: The New Road

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: Lessons of the Past
programme.desc: Winter's arrival means the people of Tanana must focus on the dangerous and potentially lucrative process of trapping, but the invading force of outside hunters are stealing from the lines.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: Burnt Offerings

programme.desc: While exploring the jungle and rivers of Sumatra, Steve and Terri investigate the last remaining habitat of the endangered Indonesian elephant.

programme.desc: A Chesapeake Bay retriever is convinced he's the alpha dog, but his big cousin isn't about to roll over. Miniature poodle Tater Tot is determined to prove she's the equal of her bigger, louder brothers. A snowy, fussy Samoyed befriends a Dalmation.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Mayday! Mayday!
programme.desc: Jackson experiences his most vicious, and most illuminating, cat attack of not just the season, but in years, at the claws of a troubled cat named May. Also, the Cat Daddy must help a nervous-wreck of a cat guardian move her two very feral cats to Canada.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: At Home With Wolves
programme.desc: A young girl hopes that Dr. Jeff can save her puppy from a deadly virus. The team treats a stray cat with a life-threatening injury. And Dr. Jeff must gain the trust of rescued wolves to help an ailing member of the pack.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Tuskegee Reunion
programme.desc: The docs visit their alma mater for a class reunion and become professors for a day. A Shih Tzu is rushed to the clinic after swallowing a large piece of rawhide while the owner of pit bull with a deformed leg must consider drastic surgery.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: First-Time Mom
programme.desc: Beautiful six-year-old okapi, K'Tusha, is nearing the end of her first pregnancy. Keepers are hoping her first baby will help to conserve this highly-endangered species from the rainforests of central Africa.

programme.title: The Zoo: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Leo, a snow leopard rescued from Pakistan, is having trouble eating because of a broken canine. The bird department works feverishly to restore a beehive for the bee-eater birds. Ambassador Center staff work with an adorable fennec fox named Charlie.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Our Gift
programme.desc: When Tia receives an adoption email unlike any she's seen before, she makes a cross-country trip to find a dog a special home in time for Christmas. And, the kid's significant others band together to give the family a present they'll never forget.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Hounded
programme.desc: When a dog that was adopted out mysteriously appears in a shelter in Mississippi, Tania and Earl head to the rescue. Parolee Joe is left shaken after separating two stray dogs fighting outside the shelter. And a hound dog adoption doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Black-ish: Big Night, Big Fight

programme.title: Black-ish: The Name Game
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have a gender reveal party, and Dre is thrilled because it's his turn to name the baby. He decides on a culturally significant name that Bow and Ruby aren't a fan of.

programme.title: Martin: Ring a Ding, Ding, Ding Gone
programme.desc: Martin takes off his wedding ring when his pals complain that it scares off women, but he's the frightened one when he has to explain its loss to Gina.

programme.title: Martin: Love T.K.O.
programme.desc: Martin and Gina's romantic weekend gets interrupted by everyone else's love woes.

programme.title: Martin: He Say, She Say
programme.desc: Cole meets a special woman with a big secret.

programme.title: Martin: Uptown Friday Night
programme.desc: After picking up Gina's earrings, Tommy, Cole and Jerome get robbed.

programme.title: Martin: Old School Loving
programme.desc: Gina gets too busy to take care of Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Cole on Ice
programme.desc: When Cole gets fired, Martin hires him.

programme.title: Martin: Housekeeper From Hell
programme.desc: Martin and Gina are afraid to terminate their tough new housekeeper.

programme.title: Martin: Three Homies and a Baby
programme.desc: Martin, Bro'man and Sheneneh babysit Martin's infant nephew Cameron, which Martin quickly regrets agreeing to do.

programme.title: Martin: Headin' for Trouble
programme.desc: Gina gets her head stuck in their new brass headboard while making love to Martin.

programme.title: Movie: Addicted
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman has a happy life and a strong marriage, but finds herself drawn to another man. What begins as a temptation becomes an addiction, as her indiscretions lead her down a path that could cost her more than just her marriage.

programme.title: Movie: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: After she escapes from her abusive husband, a woman takes on a new identity and begins a new life. Just as she's starting to trust and love again, though, her husband tracks her down and the nightmare that she'd escape begins all over again.

programme.title: Movie: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: In ancient Egypt, a mortal man makes an alliance with the god Horus to take back the throne from Set, god of darkness.

programme.title: Movie: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: Wealthy adventurer Lara Croft races to find a hidden treasure which holds the key to enormous power.

programme.title: Movie: Speed
programme.desc: A mad bomber rigs an L.A. bus to blow if it drops below 50 m.p.h. and a police officer must rescue the commuters trapped inside.

programme.title: Movie: Zombieland
programme.desc: Two men struggle to survive as they journey westward to L.A. They rely on each other, their code of rules and their cache of weapons to survive a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Behind the Panel: Birds of Prey
programme.desc: SYFY WIRE delves into the bizarre origins of DC Comics' Harley Quinn and the Birds of Prey.

programme.title: Movie: 10,000 B.C.
programme.desc: D'Leh, a young mammoth hunter, leads a small army south to rescue their loved ones from a band of warlords.

programme.title: Movie: Planet Terror
programme.desc: A small-town sheriff's department faces an outbreak of murderous, infected people called 'sickos.' A gun-legged woman named Cherry and her martial artist partner take on the zombie army.

programme.title: Gary and His Demons: Gary and His Niece
programme.desc: When Gary spends a day with his niece, he realizes his demon hunting skills are no match for the terrors that can be inflicted by a teenage girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Invaders
programme.desc: A hard working single woman is disturbed by flying saucers above her roof.

programme.title: Z Nation: A New Mission
programme.desc: Warren and gang are taken prisoner, while Murphy escapes the sub with his newly formed group of blends.

programme.title: Z Nation: Murphy's Miracle
programme.desc: Warren and the team encounter the sole inhabitant of a strange town, while Murphy begins his new mission.

programme.title: Z Nation: Escorpion and the Red Hand
programme.desc: Murphy's new cult attracts more and more followers, while the rest of the gang find themselves stuck in the middle of a war.

programme.title: Z Nation: Little Red and the Wolfz
programme.desc: A pack of wolves stalk 10K, who is injured and all alone.

programme.title: Movie: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: A line of angel warriors protect our world from demons.

programme.title: Movie: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life
programme.desc: Adventurer Lara Croft races to find Pandora's Box before it falls into the hands of a Chinese crime boss.

programme.title: House Hunters: Out of Time in Atlanta
programme.desc: After selling their home in Florida, a family is in a hurry to find something new in Atlanta. Their tight timeline is threatened, however, by disagreements on everything from budget and style to finding a garage big enough for the sports car he wants.

programme.title: House Hunters: Contemporary Vs. Vintage In Indianapolis
programme.desc: After five years of marriage, a couple in Indianapolis still doesn't agree on what makes a home perfect. She wants the vintage charm of a Victorian home, while he wants a contemporary house.

programme.title: House Hunters International: A Second-Generation Adventure
programme.desc: Experiencing West Africa as a kid left a huge impression on a woman's life, and now she has an opportunity to return to Senegal for work.

programme.title: House Hunters: Seeking Space in Walden, New York
programme.desc: A young couple is on the hunt for a home with an office and home spa in Walden, New York. He would like to live near his family, but she is really hoping for a little more privacy.

programme.title: House Hunters: New Neighbors in Knoxville
programme.desc: A couple in Knoxville, Tennessee, is looking for a larger home to grow their family. He likes living in the country and wants a new home with a rural setting, but she's tired of having snakes and opossums as neighbors and wants a change.

programme.title: House Hunters: Charleston Charm on a Budget
programme.desc: First-time buyers in Charleston, South Carolina, are looking for a home with downtown walkability and proximity to the beach. She's hoping to capture the charm and Southern hospitality of a beachfront bungalow, while he's pushing for the sleek lines.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Headfirst in Barcelona
programme.desc: A young couple decides to move in together and find an apartment in Barcelona, Spain. They've only dated a few months and they're still learning about each other, which makes agreeing on a place quite a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters: Big Dispute in the Big Apple
programme.desc: A New York City couple searches for their first home. He wants a move-in ready condo, but she would prefer a spacious brownstone, even if it needs work.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Midcentury Money Pit
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Fullerton, California, right across the street from Tarek's first flip. Before renovating, they have to deal with crumbling concrete, and they need to figure out the market for the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Broken Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house with a weird vibe in Anaheim, CA. From the start, they can't tell if someone is squatting in the house or if the neighborhood hoodlums are pranking them.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: The Fab Life: A Colorful Kitchen Makeover
programme.desc: A couple that recently moved into their Tustin, California, home started working on cosmetic changes like paint and flooring, but they had to put the kitchen project on hold when their daughter was born. They need Christina to help update the space.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: The Fab Life: Tore Down From the Floor Down
programme.desc: A couple wants to update the master bedroom and bathroom in their Costa Mesa, California, home and need Christina's help to merge their tastes into a cohesive design. While she's a fan of rustic looks, he prefers modern, clean and contemporary.

programme.title: Hot Properties: San Diego: Staycation and Renovation
programme.desc: Andrew helps finance a client's renovation to ensure they get the best presale makeover possible. Meanwhile, Seth and Mia turn an oversized bachelor pad into the perfect family home with a staycation-themed open house.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Aiming High in Singapore
programme.desc: A couple faces big adjustments after an unexpected job transfer to Singapore, including her fear of heights. They're looking for an apartment that has all the amenities with three bedrooms, and something that's near his work is a must.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Junk-Pile Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a small home with big problems in Long Beach, CA. What seems like a great home reveals an avalanche of problems from the front door to the garage.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Two Houses for Sale
programme.desc: Tarek gets a lead on a house in Buena Park, CA, and calls Christina to check it out. When they arrive at the house, they find that it's dated inside and out.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flipper vs. Flipper
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a short sale listing in an upscale neighborhood.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Barnyard Dance
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a short sale home in a desirable neighbourhood. Based on comparable homes and what they see on the outside, it seems to be a good buy. Once they tour the home, it becomes immediately clear just how much work and money is needed.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Junk Yard Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot an interesting property in Long Beach, California as they peruse the day's listings. It's a very small house with a massive structure in the backyard.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina come across a For Sale By Owner property in Garden Grove, California. This type of sale is always exciting for a flipper because it means no real estate agent commissions and an opportunity to negotiate a fair sale price.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Bigger Kitchen for a Growing Family
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs overhaul an expecting couple's outdated, 1970s home into a space that feels welcoming for their growing family.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Nightmare Cabin to Family Dream Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny modernize a couple's rundown log cabin while keeping its historic integrity intact. The top-to-bottom transformation includes new amenities like a custom live-edge bar, outdoor shower and a brand-new porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Entertaining Oasis
programme.desc: A married couple owns a wine bar and loves to entertain, but their home's not quite ready for guests due to its compartmentalized layout, unstable balconies and an enormous, rotting tree.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic Home Overhaul
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs transform the a family's historic, 1893 house. From turning an attic space into two bedrooms to completely renovating the kitchen and living area, they pull out all the stops to give the family of five their first home.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Craftsman to Creole Cottage
programme.desc: A couple who loves New Orleans-style architecture asks Dave and Jenny transform their classic Craftsman into a Creole cottage. The duo work to remodel each room with unique touches like antique doors, gas lanterns and an airy front porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Surprise Renovation for First-Time Homeowner
programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Classic Colonial Meets Modern-Day Makeover
programme.desc: Jenny and Dave are challenged to completely overhaul a historic Dutch Colonial home for a couple of farm owners and their two small children, while keeping the home's history and character.

programme.title: Home Town: Leaving the Nest
programme.desc: Newlyweds are ready to move out of a parents' garage apartment and into their first home together. With an all-in budget, these two local artists hope to find a house with a master suite, large open kitchen and plenty of room for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: Southern Coastal Style
programme.desc: With an all-in budget of $300,000, a couple is ready to move back home to Mississippi and put down roots after years of moving for work. They need help finding a home with charm and character in a small town.

programme.title: Home Town: An Old Familiar Place
programme.desc: After being away for 30 years, a woman dreams of retiring in the small town where she has fond memories of her childhood. With her all-in budget of $120,000, Erin designs an elegant home while Ben creates some unique builds including a laundry shoot.

programme.title: Movie: Erasing His Dark Past
programme.desc: A woman's husband is presumed dead, but when she tries to get his affairs in order she discovers he was not the man she thought. When he turns up alive having faked his own death, he kidnaps her daughter and forces her to find a way to escape.

programme.title: Movie: The Secret Sex Life of a Single Mom
programme.desc: A mother of two realizes she's completely lost herself after years of being in an emotionally abusive marriage. On a mission to recover, she meets 'The Duke' who promises to teach her how to become an alpha female and embrace the woman she wants to be.

programme.desc: After dreaming of becoming a star news reporter, a young women finally gets her wish after years of hard work only to be kidnapped and held captive.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: The Imaginary Friend
programme.desc: Joe Cetrone battles a demonic entity intent on harming his own son. In Ohio, a child's imaginary friend is revealed to be something much darker when it starts to tear the family apart and investigators are stalked in an old Colorado jail.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Night at the Cemetery
programme.desc: When Ursula decides to explore a haunted cemetery, she is trapped by spirits and endures the most terrifying time of her life. George is asked to remove a spirit that is attacking a young boy.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Marie Yates is convinced that the death of her grandmother was the work of an evil spirit, but becomes the target when she tries to investigate. Called in to help a woman with a mysterious illness, George Acosta discovers the only cure is an exorcism.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Close to Home
programme.desc: George Acosta is called in by his own sister to rid her home of a dark and malevolent spirit that jealously attacks visitors. When teenagers mess around with a spirit board, they mistakenly unleash a demon that threatens to possess investigator Marie.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Ghost Child
programme.desc: Investigator Michelle Desrochers must go to extraordinary lengths to stop a terrifying demonic spirit attacking a four-year boy. A ghost hunter has to face his own fear of child ghosts when called to help a family in Medway, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Here Be Demons
programme.desc: In a historic Massachusetts house, ghost hunter Jack Kenna uncovers a shocking family secret that's been hidden for centuries. Investigators are called in to save a young teenager being attacked in her sleep, but the identity of the assailant is alarming.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Spiritual Warfare
programme.desc: George Acosta is locked into an exhausting spiritual battle to expel demons from a client's home. A museum in Colorado calls Richard Estep to get to the bottom of a series of mysterious and terrifying events. Finally, Jay Yates takes on native spirits.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals: The Dark Thing/ Get Out/ The Horror in Room 3
programme.desc: A teenage girl confronts a malicious entity in the basement of an asylum, a ghostly nurse comforts a man after a terrifying encounter and a psychiatric technician is cornered by a patient more animal than human.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: My Big Fat Bleak Wedding
programme.desc: The first charter of the season is underway, and Chief Stew Jenna feels the pressure as she is tasked with planning an impromptu wedding for two drunken guests. Parker, an inexperienced deckhand, struggles to adjust to the posh life of luxury yachting.

programme.title: Below Deck: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: In part one, Andy sits down with Captain Lee and the Valor crew to discuss this season's burning issues. Simone questions Kate's management style, Chef Kevin comes clean and the crew spill the tea on a season's worth of steamy boat-mances.

programme.title: Project Runway: Sheer Genius
programme.desc: The designers are challenged with some of the toughest textiles: sexy, sheer fabrics. The competition becomes more difficult for several designers who reach their personal limits and questions their ability to make it to the end.

programme.title: Project Runway: Suit Yourself
programme.desc: Inspired by recent fashion moments like their mentor, Christian Sirano's groundbreaking Oscar look for Bill Porter, the designers find a way to bring the timelessly classic tuxedo into the future.

programme.title: Project Runway: Live and Let Tie Dye
programme.desc: The designers will need to create their own textiles to elevate the tie dye trend from casual to couture in an overnight challenge. The designers go a bit mad working into the wee hours trying to complete their high end looks.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Savannah's Big ID-EA

programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dollars and Sense

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys on Campus

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker: Denise Richard's Dad Is Looking for Love
programme.desc: Patti's task is to set up Irv, actress Denise Richard's father, whose wife passed away from cancer five years ago. Irv feels he is finally ready to date again, but Patti must find the right woman for the 62-year-old who is looking for love again.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker: Ally Shapiro, Jill Zarin and Prince Ferdinand
programme.desc: Jill Zarin is one of Patti's oldest friends, and now that her daughter Ally has just graduated from college, Jill wants Patti's help in setting her daughter on the right path to love.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker: Perez Hilton and Sonja Morgan
programme.desc: Patti tries to help celebrity blogger Perez Hilton shake his 'snarky' reputation in the dating community. Plus, Patti helps 'Real Housewives of New Jersey' star Sonja Morgan find love.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker: Jersey in the House
programme.desc: Patti is surprised with a visit from Caroline Manzo, the powerhouse of Bravo's 'The Real Housewives of New Jersey' who wants Patti to set up her two sons, Albie, 24, and Chris, 21.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker: Nene's Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Patti's good friend Nene enlists Patti's help setting up two of her single bridesmaids. Patti teaches Dawn to back off and not be too critical and to soften around the edges. Next is Diane, who tends to over-nurture her man.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker: Shereè Whitfield and Sam Querrey
programme.desc: Former Atlanta Housewife Shereè Whitfield is beautiful, but isn't known for being soft and cuddly. Patti hopes she will open up and give love a chance. Also, pro tennis player Sam Querrey is looking for an all-American girl next door.

programme.title: Movie: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker has been busy juggling his regular life with his duties as Spider-Man. With the emergence of some powerful new villains -- Electro and the Rhino -- Peter comes to realize that the new threats on the city all point back to OsCorp.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Graduation Night
programme.desc: It started with a party, high school seniors celebrating graduation. Before the night was through, one man was dead and two teens were facing a long fight for justice.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Dark Valley
programme.desc: Gavin Smith was dashing. When he vanished, LA detectives were unsure if they were investigating a crime or a suicide. His wife said he'd gotten lost in drugs and flings. Police wondered if the key to finding Gavin was hidden in one of those affairs.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Return to Manitowoc County
programme.desc: It's a gripping case that defies easy answers and Dateline has been following it for more than a decade. At the center, Steven Avery. He and his nephew were convicted of killing Teresa Halbach.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in Seattle
programme.desc: Nicole Pietz was a well-liked fitness executive married to the man of her dreams. Then one night, she didn't show up for dinner with her husband and friends.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Knock at the Door
programme.desc: Tara Ord was a beautiful young woman with big dreams. Then suddenly she vanished. With little evidence to go on, it would take years for determined cold case detectives to uncover the long buried clue that blew this case wide open.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Swept Away
programme.desc: A young man from small town Indiana heads to Japan where he falls for a beautiful woman from a land nearly as far away. Then, one of the biggest natural disasters in history hits.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Against All Odds
programme.desc: It was a crime not even police could believe: A toddler was shot in the head and left for dead. Despite the odds, she stunned everyone with her will to survive while a detective vowed to crack this case, no matter how long it took.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Lynsie Disappeared
programme.desc: It was a mystery that stumped investigators for years. A college student disappeared after a night out clubbing. Her mother thought she was at a sleepover with friends and it took an eagle-eyed detective to find the truth buried in a pile of lies.

programme.title: Movie: Proud Mary
programme.desc: Mary is a professional hit woman for one of Boston's powerful organized crime families, and she's never run into a problem that couldn't be solved at gunpoint, but her life is turned upside down when a hit gone wrong leads her to an orphaned boy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Great
programme.desc: Homer is stripped of his membership in a secret society when he destroys their parchment.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Half-Decent Proposal
programme.desc: Marge's wealthy ex-boyfriend visits Springfield with the hope of winning her heart.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Simpson, This Is Your Wife
programme.desc: Homer's obsession with Lenny's new plasma TV prompts Marge to enter the family in a sweepstakes, and they win a trip to the Fox Studio Lot. Against Marge's wishes, Homer signs them up for a Trading Spouses-type show.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Double Double Boy in Trouble
programme.desc: Bart meets his exact look-alike, Simon Woosterfield, who happens to be a member of the richest family in Springfield. When the boys decide to switch places, Bart learns that his wealthy 'siblings' are plotting his demise so they can get his inheritance.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Devil Wears Nada
programme.desc: In an effort to raise money for charity, Marge and 'Philanthro-Chicks' decide to pose for a calendar. At the photo studio, Marge is reluctant to reveal skin, but the photographer loosens her up with wine and, before long, Marge is the talk of the town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Saga of Carl Carlson
programme.desc: When Homer and his friends win $200,000 in the Springfield lottery, Carl takes off to Iceland with all the winnings.

programme.title: Family Guy: The D in Apartment 23
programme.desc: When Brian posts an offensive tweet that goes viral and the rest of the Griffins are also treated as outcasts, he's forced to move out of the Griffin house.

programme.title: Family Guy: Petey IV
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving weekend, Peter discovers an alternate ending in the Russian version of one of his favorite films and writes to Vladimir Putin, who comes to Quahog. Meanwhile, a strapped-for-cash Brian gets a job at a suicide hotline center.

programme.title: Family Guy: Crimes and Meg's Demeanor
programme.desc: Peter encourages Meg to attend a high school party, where she takes up drinking, which both concerns and delights her father. Meanwhile, Brian begins spying on his neighbors and suspects Principal Shepherd of a crime.

programme.title: Family Guy: V Is for Mystery
programme.desc: In a special Dickensian-themed episode, Stewie and Brian are detectives who embark on solving a string of mysterious murders set in Victorian-era London.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: Archer: Training Day
programme.desc: Lana's residual lust for Archer prompts Malory to promote Cyril to field agent. Archer then trains his new competition as only he can, whilst Malory frets over her own past and her son's future.

programme.title: Archer: Diversity Hire
programme.desc: A new field agent makes a splash at ISIS, but Archer and Lana suspect there may be something all too perfect about their new diversity hire.

programme.title: You're the Worst: From the Beginning, I Was Screwed
programme.desc: Gretchen participates in a family tradition with Boone and his daughter while Jimmy competes on an NPR game show in an attempt to regain some literary cred. Edgar attempts to deepen his friendship with Max.

programme.title: You're the Worst: Like People
programme.desc: Gretchen spends the day with Boone and his daughter in an attempt to distract herself from having slept with Jimmy the previous night, while Jimmy tries to prove to himself he’s moved on.

programme.title: Mom: Dirty Money and a Woman Named Mike

programme.title: Mom: A Commemorative Coin and a Misshapen Head
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie worry when they find out that Violet's new boyfriend is old enough to be her father.

programme.title: Mom: Dropped Soap and a Big Guy on a Throne
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie face temptation when Bonnie is prescribed pain medication for a back injury.

programme.title: Mom: Mashed Potatoes and a Little Nitrous

programme.title: Black-ish: Dreamgirls and Boys
programme.desc: Dre and Bow struggle with the changing times of identity politics and gender neutrality. Diane auditions for the school play and scores the male lead part, but her crush starts spending time with another girl.

programme.title: Movie: Spectre
programme.desc: The world's most notorious secret agent works to expose a pernicious spy ring in the newest installment of the enduring franchise. Bond enlists the help of his colleagues to uncover the truth about Spectre and the shadowy figure at its centre.

programme.title: Movie: Gone Girl
programme.desc: A man reports that his beautiful wife has gone missing, and signs inside their home point to a struggle. Over the course of the high-profile investigation, his story and behaviour begin to unravel, leading everyone to wonder whether he murdered her.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Mountains
programme.desc: In this episode we climb high into the world's great mountain ranges. Only a few pioneering animals have what it takes to survive up here, they are amongst the most elusive and mysterious on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles are the richest places on Earth. A magical world of surprise, drama and unforgettable wild characters. From the jungles of Brazil to Costa Rica, watch as the animals face life in the most competitive place on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Grasslands
programme.desc: Grasslands cover one quarter of all land and support the greatest gatherings of wildlife on Earth. The extraordinary creatures that live here must survive the most hostile seasons on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Deserts
programme.desc: In this episode we visit the world's deserts, a land of extremes that pushes life to the limit. Animals here have developed ingenious ways of dealing with the hostile conditions giving rise to the most incredible survival stories on Earth.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities
programme.desc: Rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa stands The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree. with the ability to withstand the unforgiving conditions of the surrounding desolate landscape, and with minimal rainfall, it is a testament to survival.

programme.title: Dirk Gently's Holistic Detective Agency: Shapes and Colors
programme.desc: The case seems to take a major turn when Arnold, the son of the dead Cardenas couple, shows up. Meanwhile, Amanda is led to a mystical coven in the woods of Wendimoor led by the forest witch Wakti Wapnasi, where she begins to master her unique powers.

programme.title: Dirk Gently's Holistic Detective Agency: Girl Power
programme.desc: As we grow closer to an answer about the case and the identity of 'The Boy,' our villains converge to stop our heroes with a shocking outcome.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Best of Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Revisit the most memorable scenes from Blue Planet II's seven episodes. Highlights include giant trevally that fly out of the water to snatch seabirds in mid-air and the industrious tuskfish who uses a coral anvil to crack open his clams.

programme.title: The Making of Planet Earth
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of 'Planet Earth' and inside the massive project to create the epic 11-part series.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Borderforce USA: The Bridges: Five-Million Dollar Meth Bust
programme.desc: A young woman from Cuba crosses the bridge in the hope of being granted political asylum in America while officers in Laredo get a surprise when they stop three biology students carrying something unusual in the boot of their car.

programme.title: Borderforce USA: Suspicious Travelers
programme.desc: In this episode officers are suspicious when an elderly couple arrive from Mexico with five suitcases but no clothes.

programme.title: Hidden Gems of Turkey: Istanbul: East Meets West
programme.desc: Andrew Evans explores the cultural melting pot of Istanbul.

programme.title: Alaska's Glacier Bay
programme.desc: Nestled in the heart of southeast Alaska, Glacier Bay is a wild paradise of ocean and ice. Brown bears, bald eagles, humpback whales and nearly every other species here are ultimately tied to the incredible migration and life cycle of salmon.

programme.title: Inside 9/ 11: Zero Hour
programme.desc: Learn what happened on September 11, as Zero Hour gives a detailed account of that day.

programme.title: Inside 9/ 11: War on America
programme.desc: Terrorist activities aimed at the U.S. are tracked throughout the 1990s starting with the 1993 World Trade Center bombing. Every successful attack emboldens the al Qaeda and the legend of Osama bin Laden grows.

programme.desc: Authentic transmissions from on-board stewardesses, chilling voicemails from victims and never-before-seen interviews provide a groundbreaking insight into what really happened on this ill-fated day.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Keeper Tales: Call of the Flamingo
programme.desc: Keepers tend to a grumpy Pallas cat who is losing weight and a flamingo who has lost her voice.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Keeper Tales: Penguin Problems
programme.desc: Keepers at the Columbus Zoo tend to a pregnant cheetah and a penguin stuck in molt.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Keeper Tales: Cub Nation
programme.desc: Newborns and an emergency surgery keep staff at the Columbus Zoo on their toes.

programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair brings a lot of animals to the clinic for last minute checkups by Dr. Pol and his team before they are shown at the 4-H competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: The Cow Jumped Over the Moon
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and Diane are convinced the full moon has caused some unpredictable animal behaviour, as well as several emergencies at the clinic, but Charles isn't so sure.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: What's Up, Doc?
programme.desc: With temperatures blazing in Michigan, Dr. Pol and his team are busier than ever helping animals in need. With a full list, Dr. Pol needs to treat his sickest patients first.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Inside El Chapo's Escape
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal how El Chapo escaped from a high security prison in Mexico. Mysterious patterns in the Australian outback and the Kalahari Desert spark a major scientific investigation. A giant black stain appears in a war-torn area of Iraq.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters of Diamond Desert
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past. When a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: We don't yet know where the edge of the universe is or what happens there, but thanks to cutting-edge technology and new discoveries, experts might finally reveal the secrets of the phenomena that can be found in deepest reaches of the cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Siberian Lake Serpent and Mystery of the Bosnian Pyramid
programme.desc: For centuries, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Confessions of the Exorcist
programme.desc: For the first time, a participant in the real exorcism that inspires the movie 'The Exorcist' reveals his experience.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Ghost Yacht and Freaky Fires
programme.desc: Three friends disappear from their catamaran off the coast of Queensland. In a Sicilian village, ordinary items spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Flannan Lighthouse and Aleshenka: Russian Mummy
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped: Human Sacrifice in the Sky
programme.desc: Ramy investigates the mummies of three Incan children discovered atop the Argentinian Andes at a UFO hotspot.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped: The Cursed Mummy Tribe
programme.desc: Deep in the Peruvian jungle, dozens of mummies have been found in cliffside tombs. These remains could be the first Europeans to settle the new world. Mummy expert Ramy Romany searches for undiscovered bodies to unlock the mystery.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped: Fire in King Tut's Tomb
programme.desc: Ramy investigates the mummy of King Tut to see if it's charred because of a change in the mummification process to insure immortality or a far more sinister plot.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped: Mayan Mass Grave Mystery
programme.desc: A mysterious underwater grave is investigated by mummy expert Ramy Romany who studies the world's dead to uncover their secrets. Locals think the grave is guarded by a Mayan serpent deity. When Ramy dives in, he uncovers evidence of biological warfare.

programme.title: Crime 360: Final Call
programme.desc: Homicide detectives Thompson and Pence are called out to a bloody crime scene. A local tenant knows the victim, but claims to have no knowledge of the murder.

programme.title: Crime 360: Payback
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the murder of a man found riddled with bullet holes after his van crashed in front of a house in a quiet neighbourhood.

programme.title: City Confidential: Carlsbad: Danger in the Desert
programme.desc: Johnny Volpato, a popular politician and pharmacist, was accused of shooting his wife.

programme.title: City Confidential: Bad News in Battle Creek
programme.desc: Residents of a peaceful Michigan city are shocked when a local TV anchorwoman is murdered.

programme.title: City Confidential: Detroit: A Co-ed's Secret Life

programme.title: City Confidential: Boston: Betrayal in Beantown
programme.desc: When the Boston police are fooled into believing a black man killed a pregnant white woman, the city is the scene of strong racism.

programme.title: American Justice: Murder on the Boardwalk

programme.title: American Justice: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Police investigate a photographer when a model goes missing after a photo shoot.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Brotherhood
programme.desc: The brother of a paramedic gets sucker-punched and a pair of best friends are in an accident together. A member of the team comforts a suicidal patient.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Southern Comfort
programme.desc: In every case, the members of the Nightwatch offer southern hospitality, New Orleans style.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Poached
programme.desc: Detectives come up with a creative plan to catch two dangerous alligator poachers red-handed.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Cursed
programme.desc: After grappling with one mishap after another, Tom seeks the help of a voodoo priestess to see if she can cure him.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Geaux Speed Racers
programme.desc: The deputies are called in to bust teens illegally street racing in the bayou. Deputy Marlin Meeks is dispatched to a disturbance at an old house that is rumoured to be haunted.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Gator Man's Law
programme.desc: Corporal Storm Fitch finds an abandoned car in the marsh just off an eerie and haunted bayou road.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bourgeois' Last Stand
programme.desc: Sheriff Vernon Bourgeois is weeks away from retiring, but he determines to take down a major copper theft ring that's been terrorizing his parish.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Lost in the Swamp
programme.desc: Deputy Keith Bergeron goes deep in the bayou to check out a report of someone burning trash, but finds himself outnumbered by several angry locals.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Special Delivery
programme.desc: A case that involves cocaine, morphine and a strange love triangle leads the Squad into the community for a street bust.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Conspiracy
programme.desc: With inmate drug use at an all-time high, the Squad searches for the source of the drugs that have made their way into the prison.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Vows, Lies, and Whispers
programme.desc: Free-spirited Hope follows her heart to Oklahoma to marry Jerry Meek but it's not long before kids come along and the honeymoon is over. On the night of February 21, 2002, a series of mysterious events shatter the family and remain unresolved for years.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love, Sex, and Trucking
programme.desc: Frances and Bill Hall Jr. appear to be the perfect couple two kids, a successful business, and a 30-year marriage. But on October 13, 2013, an unexpected encounter leads to a fatality, and the investigation reveals a story of infidelity and obsession.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Three Pops and a Pause
programme.desc: Ashlee and Emmett Corrigan seem to have it all; true love, five beautiful children, and a growing business. But in March 2011, an explosive encounter blows their lives apart in an instant, revealing their marriage is not what it seemed.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The 22-Year Itch
programme.desc: In January 2003, Curt and Donna Thorngren's 22-year marriage, destroyed by debt, deceit, and drug addiction, ended in murder.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Final Sale
programme.desc: 50-year-old Beverly Carter is an internet savvy real-estate agent, but when she goes to meet a prospective buyer at a remote house, she goes missing. The search for Beverly goes viral, but depends on unravelling a web of false identities and fake clues.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Blood Mountain
programme.desc: Meredith Emerson decides to celebrate the new year by hiking on Georgia's Blood Mountain with her dog, Ella. When Meredith goes missing and Ella is found 60 miles away, an all-out search begins.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Route 29
programme.desc: In August 2013, a 17-year-old rising social media star and high school athlete disappeared along the infamous Route 29. A massive search by local and federal authorities yielded zero results until a security video revealed a chilling clue.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Candymen
programme.desc: The George Brothers grew up privileged, but had no respect for authority. In Florida's pill-mill epidemic of the late 2000s, the Georges rose to millionaire status, only to crash amidst a chaos of overdoses, arrests and a tragic train accident.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Folie Aux Deux
programme.desc: The Hopkins sisters seem to have the perfect life, but under the surface lurks a disease that will lead them down a path of destruction. When they begin to feel a man from their past is after them, they'll do whatever it takes to protect their family.

programme.title: Love Kills: Sheltered to Shackles
programme.desc: Victoria comes from a good family but can't help falling for Raymon, a bad boy from the streets. She quickly falls into a life of crime with him, breaking into homes and cars. When the couple ups the ante to armed robbery, their lives are changed forever.

programme.title: Love Kills: Damning Our Future
programme.desc: When Chance and Danielle first lock eyes, sparks fly. Both have a history of breaking the law. They fall madly in love and move in together with Danielle's young daughter. But when they can't pay their bills, they're lured back to a life of crime.

programme.title: Love Kills: Matchmaker to Murder
programme.desc: When Damarius and his girlfriend Alyssa find out she's pregnant, the couple's parents are furious. The friction culminates in a terrible tragedy, resulting the arrest of Damarius. Weeks later, a surprising twist will reveal the couple's darkest secret.

programme.title: Bad Romance: An ID Valentine's Day Event
programme.desc: Marriage turns deadly when a housewife is caught between her husband and her boyfriend. Then, a man's fantasy becomes fatal after a jealous threesome. Finally, a human curry is stewed.

programme.title: Bad Romance: An ID Valentine's Day Event
programme.desc: A woman's picture-perfect life turns deadly after a vile love triangle is exposed.

programme.title: Bad Romance: An ID Valentine's Day Event
programme.desc: An instant love connection goes up in flames after a young couple can't escape the dark secrets of their pasts.

programme.title: Bad Romance: An ID Valentine's Day Event
programme.desc: As a young woman begins her independent life, she finds herself caught in an obsessive relationship with fatal consequences.

programme.title: Bad Romance: An ID Valentine's Day Event

programme.title: Bad Romance: An ID Valentine's Day Event

programme.title: Bad Romance: An ID Valentine's Day Event
programme.desc: It started with Valentine's Day cookies, but it ends with murder.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World
programme.desc: Delve into the unknown stories behind some of the biggest disasters, threats and conquests in America's skies. From the attack on Pearl Harbor, the Hindenburg disaster, Apollo 13 and the race to the Moon.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Discover the unknown stories of some of the incredible plots, ploys and people behind America's secret weapons during the Cold War, the Vietnam War, and WWII.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas. Where Mobsters once ruled. Where casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. See why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for atomic bombs and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Experimental Soldiers
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, the United States of America searches for a way to create a generation of 'Supersoldiers' who use telepathy to win battles. In the 1950s gangster Whitey Bulger volunteers for the CIA's LSD project known as MK-Ultra.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Gold Mine in the Keystone State
programme.desc: Mark finds a bank barn in Pennsylvania, perfectly preserved, and considers keeping it for himself. He also visits an incredible bank barn that has been renovated completely into a high-end home that has barnwood flooring and soapstone counters.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Bonanza
programme.desc: The builders score a major salvage from a barn near one of America's oldest pine forests in Brookville, Pennsylvania. Later, Mark and Sherman visit a local mill that turns reclaimed wood into spectacular products.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Foldable Cabin
programme.desc: Mark brings one of his biggest ideas to life, a foldable steel cabin. The crew takes the cabin on its maiden voyage and unfolds it for the first time in the boneyard, then they add a timber frame facade and a complete barnwood interior to finish it off.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fancy Cabin Takedown in Minor Hill
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work through layers of architectural history to uncover an original pioneer home. They hear stories from family members who lived in the cabin. Mark also visits a beautifully restored log home with its own extensive history.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Shaky Ground
programme.desc: Three new build teams arrive to their build sites and begin work on their unique cabins in the remote Alaskan wilderness. Josh Tousignant and his crew make the long trip to Cordova to begin building the foundation for their clients' two-story cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Anything Can Go Wrong
programme.desc: At Trinity Lake, Chris and Joe battle an 80-foot spruce that begins to fall too soon before a helicopter delivery almost goes wrong. John and Heather fall behind while building the floor of their cabin due to the rain and need to get back to schedule.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.desc: A hula instructor and drum maker are looking to build a yurt on their Oahu property. Rain and mud slows the build down, and Nathan and Jenny fight against the clock and the elements to complete the yurt on time.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Builders Begin Construction on a Fishing Retreat, a Ski Hut and a Getaway Cabin.
programme.desc: The return of spring means the race is on to begin constructing homes before the return of winter shuts them down. Three builders begin construction on a fishing retreat, a ski hut and a getaway log cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Dangerous Delays
programme.desc: Tony's log cabin getaway is shut down after heavy rains make work too dangerous, a measurement error at Lee's two story house has the crew enraged, and Derek takes his crew fishing to reward them for a job well done as the ski hut continues to thrive.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Missing Helicopter
programme.desc: Lee's crew scrambles to correct a mistake after a mighty framing miscalculation. Tony makes a dangerous call to fix a problem that could destroy his own log cabin. Transport of Derek's ski hut begins, but the helicopter goes missing.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game Day
programme.desc: Just as Derek and his band of buddies are about to give up on their dream of a cliffside ski hut, Alaska hands them a miracle that turns a down day into game day. Meanwhile, Lee loses one of his hardest working crew members.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Finest Moment
programme.desc: Lee and his crew install a new woodstove to dry out the drywall mud and tape, and while he's waiting, Lee takes time to enjoy everything Alaska has to offer. Meanwhile, Derek and his band of ski buddies race to protect the cabin from bears.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Final Push
programme.desc: Lee is down to a crew of just three as he races to finish the interior of the cabin. Tony's crew discovers a serious miscalculation that will force them to miss their deadline unless a miracle occurs. Derek and his crew push through endless rainfall.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bowman House
programme.desc: The crew salvages an early 1800s farmhouse in Mt. Jackson, VA.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items in Norfolk and Petersburg into Repurposed Goods.
programme.desc: The crew pays homage to their old red truck by turning it into a bench.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Weatherford Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs crew saves parts of a farmhouse in South Boston, VA. Key items include chairs, milk-painted paneling, and an arched window.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Little Chef Diner
programme.desc: The Dawgs stay in Roanoke to salvage an old diner sign. The crew also picks through a huge warehouse in Greensboro, NC. Back at the shop, the Whiteside family works together to build a clock from road signs.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke Chamber Of Commerce
programme.desc: The Dawgs save pieces from the Roanoke Chamber of Commerce, including safe deposit boxes and a pneumatic messaging system. The team also works on a large bar commissioned for the Natural Bridge Hotel.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Trenton High School
programme.desc: The Dawgs return to Trenton Central High School in Trenton, NJ. Key items found include four large clock faces and library ladders. In the shop, Mike and Tay build a table from an old jail bed.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Oak Mountain Spring State Fair/ Apache Rattlesnake Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is crazy about fried bread pudding bites in Alabama. He then gets bitten by a fried rattlesnake in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Portland Rose Festival and Got to Be NC Fair
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe is in Portland to try beef tongue tacos. He then heads to North Carolina for a donut sloppy Joe.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A-Frying In Winter
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chills out with some cool Twin City treats at the Saint Paul Winter Carnival. Despite sub-zero temperatures, he gets into the spirit with local specialties like the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch
programme.desc: Ali Khan makes a beeline for an over-the-top pistachio chicken salad creation in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out
programme.desc: We're paying tribute to the best styles, cuts and steakhouses serving up the best steaks. Chef Jonathon Sawyer takes us on a trip to Dayton for a ribeye cut so incredibly, it's fit for a king.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.desc: Adam goes to Alaska for a massive burger, a mountainous breakfast and a monster challenge.

programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Robot/ PJ Power Up

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wolfy Powers / Do The Gekko
programme.desc: After their powers are stolen and given to the Woflies, the PJ Masks ally with them to vanquish Romeo. Night Ninja hypnotizes all of the school kids with his special ninja dance!

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Hatastrophe/ Fly South
programme.desc: Kermit accidentally loses Fozzie's new hat; Once Gonzo learns that birds fly south for the winter, he tries to keep his friends from leaving.

programme.desc: When Buddy the Bunny goes missing on the Muppet Babies Express, Summer Penguin sets out to find him. Mr. Manny steps in for Miss Nanny when she runs an errand.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly reunite Cupcake and Rufus after a fight; Bob forgets his camera on a trolley.

programme.title: Movie: Poetic Justice

programme.title: Movie: Anything for Love
programme.desc: Katherine believes men are intimidated by her career, creates an internet dating profile claiming she is an executive assistant rather than a high-powered executive.

programme.title: Movie: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: Movie: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: A reality TV host is fired from her job and so she returns home before Valentine's Day. While home, she finds herself running the town's festival, with her ex-fiancé and their two, scheming mothers.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Under Wraps
programme.desc: A woman loses her job and beau on the same day and reluctantly accepts a position in Alaska. When she gets the position she originally hoped for, she must choose between a life she's always wanted and her new life in Alaska.

programme.title: Movie: Forever in My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs - back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Movie: Date With Love
programme.desc: After a-list actress, Alex Allen, has an epic Hollywood meltdown, she is in need of some positive publicity. Salvation comes in the form of a small town boy's video 'promposal' in which the student invites Alex to prom.

programme.title: Movie: A Harvest Wedding
programme.desc: A wedding planner in New York is hired to plan the most anticipated wedding of the season. But the bride wants the wedding to be on the family farm which is now being run by her older brother who happens to be her ex.

programme.title: Movie: Destination Wedding
programme.desc: A woman has been painstakingly planning her sister's destination wedding for the longest time and as guests arrive on a beach paradise, she runs into her ex-boyfriend, who also happens to be the best man.

programme.title: Movie: The Last Bridesmaid
programme.desc: A woman is focused on taking over her family business, instead of looking for a man. All her friends are getting married and she seems to get new invitations in the mail weekly. While at a wedding, she meets a documentarian, and he changes her life.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: A woman is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, her luck begins to turn around.

programme.title: Movie: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: A woman is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former 'Most Eligible Bachelor' how to dance for his extravagant, society wedding. But as the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between them.

programme.title: Movie: Surprised by Love
programme.desc: A young businesswoman tries to convince parents to approve of her boyfriend. She finds herself questioning her own life choices.

programme.title: Movie: Love Unleashed
programme.desc: A woman hosts a puppy party and in attendance is a single father. She teaches him the value of adding a puppy to his home, and along the way, they fall in love.
