programme.title: Dance It Out: Billy Blanks Jr and Melissa Surprised by James Iglehart
programme.desc: Meet Melissa Vitti who lost 100-pounds and is surprised by Aladdin and Hamilton's Broadway star James Iglehart.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: New Wife, New Life
programme.desc: With the thrill of the honeymoon over, five pairs of newlyweds return to Washington DC to begin living together as husband and wife.

programme.title: Movie: She Made Them Do It
programme.desc: Based on the story of Sarah Pender, a murderer who escaped from prison only to become one of the most notorious women ever to top the list of America's Most Wanted.

programme.title: Movie: The Client List
programme.desc: A former Texas homecoming queen inadvertently finds herself in the middle of a prostitution ring after unknowingly accepting a position at a massage parlor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Hands Full of Gold
programme.desc: Dakota Fred taps out Thunder Falls with his biggest gold haul. Dustin hits the nugget jackpot at Rockfall Ravine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Parker moves his Big Red washplant in attempts of meeting his mining gold. Rick gets surprising results when he runs his washplant at maximum speed. With just one operation, Tony's entire season is threatened.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker Doubles Down
programme.desc: Parker makes a big move to double his output to bring in more gold. The Beets face a catastrophe when their remaining operation grinds to a halt. Fred fires his dredge back up and lands his biggest gold haul yet. Dustin faces an uncertain future.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Rebellion at Duncan Creek
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: A machine failure causes an explosive uprising on Rick's claim. Parker's team tries to build a mountain of pay dirt. Tony decides to run his operation around the clock to increase his gold total.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Royal Flush
programme.desc: The Dakota boys finish out their season with a record gold haul. Parker constructs a mega pond to keep his operation running. Monica races to run newly thawed paydirt that could save the season. The Dakota boys and Parker's crew tell all on The Dirt.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Hot Hot Heat
programme.desc: The Rookies battle their biggest claim yet, and each other. Col's Crew must bring out the old machines to hunt a new opal seam. It's heating up as the Fire Crew race a fuel leak chasing legendary red fire opal.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Back From the Dead
programme.desc: From the castle that inspired the home of an iconic vampire to the market where Santa's devilish sidekick stalks and scares holiday revelers, Josh Gates tells the stories of places where legends never die.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: Rainy Lake Team Challenge: International Falls, MN
programme.desc: Jacob Wheeler and Scott Martin team up against Andrew Upshaw and Andy Young on Rainy Lake, International Falls, MN for an Epic Team Challenge for Big Fish.

programme.title: The Experience: Tracy Lawrence Country Music Artist Brenton Lindsey - Hero

programme.desc: Dozer Dave perfects the art of prospecting while on the hunt for his new lost mine.

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Fish Stories

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stankin' Up the Joint
programme.desc: Someone has an odd prayer for Yamaneika, Matteo Lane has a hilarious blind date in Italy, and Ronnie Jordan has some tips for the single women at the office. Plus, Corey Rodrigues knows the importance of sunblock at the beach.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Fingering the Man

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Crazy in Love

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out

programme.desc: Guy explores a diner that serves an old-school Southern classic: meat and three sides.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Loaded
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for the biggest and fullest loaded meals and flavours around.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Dishes
programme.desc: Guy takes on unique eats. In Honolulu, a Jamaican joints serves up jerk chicken wings and goat curry. In Arlington, it's potato pancake stuffed with beef. And in Las Vegas, a taco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Festival of Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's pullin' over for the bounty of the county.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soup, Salad and Seafood
programme.desc: Guy's dives into classic comfort foods in Kansas City and in Franklin, Tennessee.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Righteous Bites
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is enjoying dishes from both sides of the pacific. In Los Angeles, he's trying a fat Jerry Sammy and a number of fried favorites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Small Town Standouts
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up small towns with big flavor. In Parkland, Wisconsin, the he stops at a roadside bar making sandwiches stuffed with brisket and crispy pork belly.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old School Joints
programme.desc: Guy gets a taste of yesteryear. In Duluth, an Italian market/restaurant is stacking up hearty homemade lasagna and a monster muffaletta. In Eugene, Ore., DDD's first all-vegan spot serves their signature tofu sammy and frozen peanut butter.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Longmont, Colorado to check out what they're doing with cauliflower and pork burgers. In Columbus, Ohio, a Chicago-style restaurant makes Italian beef and gyros. Aarti Sequeira and Jet Tila meet Guy in Los Angeles for fiery Thai.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Appeal
programme.desc: Guy's going on an international flavorfest.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Layered, Stuffed and Stacked
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy on this trip, as Guy Fieri first stops in to see an old buddy in Kansas City, Mo., who's got new spots and a secret menu of sandwiches that are not so secret anymore.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Bacon And Bbq
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., a funky farm-to-table spot piles up a pimento cheeseburger and homemade brats. In Napa, Calif., an amazing Asian joint cooks up kimchi fried rice and pork ramen. In San Antonio, Texas, Guy stops for some bomb barbecue.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eating Up New Orleans
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a tasty tour of New Orleans, Louisiana. He rolls into a legit butcher shop with a funky take on the Big Easy's comfort food flavors.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly, Beef And Bratwurst

programme.title: Roseanne: Like, a New Job

programme.title: Roseanne: The Commercial Show
programme.desc: Roseanne tries to convince her boss Leon that she and her family are perfect to star in a commercial for the coffee shop. Meanwhile, D.J. is upset when he discovers his friend from next door is moving to Chicago.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan try to keep laughing so they won't start crying as their motorcycle shop goes out of business. Meanwhile, Becky's boyfriend Mark is offered a fabulous job in another state, so they decide to elope.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement

programme.desc: It's a need for speed (and tanks) when ATM is enlisted to build aquariums for NASCAR legends Ryan Newman and Kurt Busch. Ryan wants a desk-tank for his animal shelter, while Kurt and his wife want an ode to their Hawaiian wedding.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Fast and the Fishiest
programme.desc: Lusso Auto Spa designs customizations for high end and rare vehicles, now they want an exotic fish tank that matches their automobiles. They've requested a massive 14 foot, three sided wonder that will sit amidst their multi-million dollar cars.

programme.title: Tanked!: Driving New Business
programme.desc: Brett and Wayde are challenged to turn an entire Toyota Highlander into an aquarium while simultaneously opening a new ATM office in South Florida. Brett decides to turn a vintage slot machine into a tank to bring a little bit of Vegas to South Florida.

programme.title: Tanked!: Panama City Beach Tank
programme.desc: The Laketown Wharf resort in Panama City Beach wants a nautical themed fish tank to be the centerpiece of its new restaurant. With a weathered dock look, and colorful sea turtle sculptures this cylindrical tank is bound to make the boys want a vacation.

programme.title: Tanked!: Ty Dolla's Fresh Tank
programme.desc: Hip-hop artist Ty Dolla $ign wants a tank in his house in Long Beach. He calls in Wayde and Brett to construct a huge freshwater tank. Complete with a real rock insert, perfect replicas of Ty's awards, and embedded into a wall.

programme.title: Tanked!: DJ of Dragons

programme.title: Movie: A Deadly Dance

programme.title: Movie: Killer Twin

programme.desc: A social worker battles an evil entity for a young girl's soul, a security guard encounters a reanimated corpse in a hospital morgue and a rookie nurse hears an ominous call for help from an empty patient room.

programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Movie: Zombies 2
programme.desc: A cheerleader and a football players are preparing to go off to their prom. They don't realize that they are facing danger, in the form of teenage werewolves that threaten to derail their plans for the perfect night.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention

programme.title: Jessie: Someone Has Tou-pay

programme.title: The Communicators

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: A young mom, married to her high school sweetheart, vanishes. Did she leave her family to start a new life or was there another reason for her disappearance? Decades later her grown son faced a dark truth at the core of this mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: While They Were Sleeping
programme.desc: It was a brutal and baffling crime: a husband shot dead in his own bed. No one else in the house was hurt, not even his wife, who was sleeping beside him. Investigators were suspicious, but there were more surprises in store.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: For a day that ended so tragically, it started with roses. Nathan and Denise Leuthold had known each other since grade school. Together they built their family on faith, but in a flash, one of them was dead and the other was under suspicion.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Inside the Hunt for El Chapo

programme.title: Snapped: Martha Farmer
programme.desc: A parking lot shooting in the dead of night leaves detectives with a long list of suspects, but all along the killer is hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Snapped: Laura Stelmasek
programme.desc: Police must unravel a mystery involving an Arizona couple, cross-country romance and a deadly plan.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Paet
programme.desc: An Air Force sergeant is gunned down in his garage revealing an elaborate conspiracy with an unlikely mastermind.

programme.title: Snapped: Kalila Taylor
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a homecoming queen shocks a NY town.

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Bryan
programme.desc: A suspicious shooting reveals a pretty real estate agent’s scandalous secret life.

programme.title: Snapped: Jessica Hill
programme.desc: A man dies in an apparent freak accident, but soon his wife is accused of murder and more.

programme.title: Snapped: Kristi Fulgham
programme.desc: A 13-year-old confesses to murder, but police suspect he's being manipulated by his half-sister.

programme.title: Snapped: Cheryl Kunkle
programme.desc: A murder investigation which pits a son against his mother sheds new light on a previously unsolved death.

programme.desc: A brutal murder uncovers one couple’s shocking history of domestic abuse and raises surprising questions about the identity of the aggressor.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Swimming With Sharks
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found beaten to death at the neighborhood pool, launching her father on a mission to catch her killer that ultimately changes crime fighting forever.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Last Call
programme.desc: Friends in New Orleans hit the town looking for a night of fun. But by sunrise, one of them is found dead in the trunk of a burned-out car. No one escapes suspicion, but it's the victim's own words that eventually help bring down her killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: During a cold Minneapolis winter, a night out with good friends takes a dark turn when one of them disappears. Days later, when human remains are discovered, investigators travel a chilling path to catch a killer before another night ends in murder.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Acting On Evil
programme.desc: After a Wisconsin cast party, a mother makes an unimaginable discovery. Suddenly, a close circle of friends is under suspicion for murder. As detectives work quickly to unravel this mystery, another vicious attack may lead them to their killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Janet Tyburski
programme.desc: A doting grandmother alerts police when she recognizes her daughter’s dead body on the evening news, triggering an investigation that proves blood isn’t always thicker than water.

programme.title: Movie: Lucy
programme.desc: In a world overcome by lawlessness and corruption, an unwilling drug mule develops superhuman abilities when the drug leaks into her system.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Principal Charming

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Love Lisa
programme.desc: Lisa gives Ralph Wiggum a Valentine's Day card, and Ralph assumes that she's in love with him. Lisa tries to let him down nicely, but Ralph won't get the hint until she yells at him in front of a live studio audience at the Krusty the Clown special.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Another Simpsons Clip Show
programme.desc: A romance novel prompts Marge to have a family meeting to discuss love. Through a series of clips from past episodes, the family recounts their trials and tribulations with love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm With Cupid
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Apu makes other husbands look bad by showering his wife with gifts.

programme.title: The Simpsons: C.E. D'Oh
programme.desc: When Homer enrolls in a How to Succeed in Being You course, he gets a new attitude.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love, Springfieldian Style
programme.desc: When Marge and Homer get trapped in a tunnel of love, they entertain each other with their takes on the Bonnie and Clyde, the 'Lady and the Tramp' and the Sex Pistols romances.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Blue and the Gray
programme.desc: After spending another Valentine's Day alone, Moe attends a seminar to gain more confidence with women. Moe takes the doctor's advice and asks Homer to be his wingman, but then becomes distraught when women are drawn to Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Daughter Also Rises
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa's mother-daughter Valentine's Day plans change when Lisa meets an intellectual romantic who shares her passion for culture, history and literature.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Helen Hunt
programme.desc: The Belchers make it their mission to help Teddy get his dream girl, but Tina is convinced she's found a better match for him.

programme.title: Family Guy: Emmy-Winning Episode
programme.desc: Tired of not winning an Emmy, Peter embarks on his own For Your Consideration campaign for Family Guy by making the show more like Emmy-winning shows and no category is off limits.

programme.desc: Malory hosts a dinner party for UN Intelligence Chairman Torvald Utne in an effort to get a new weapons contract for ISIS. Unfortunately, a group of rival assassins have targeted Mr. Utne for elimination.

programme.title: Archer: Honeypot
programme.desc: Malory's career is threatened when a sensitive videotape falls into the hands of a rogue (and roguish) Cuban agent, so she calls on Archer's expertise in seduction to turn the tables on her blackmailer.

programme.desc: A man reports that his beautiful wife has gone missing, and signs inside their home point to a struggle. Over the course of the high-profile investigation, his story and behaviour begin to unravel, leading everyone to wonder whether he murdered her.

programme.title: Movie: All the Money in the World
programme.desc: The story of the kidnapping of John Paul Getty III and the desperate attempt by his mother to convince his billionaire grandfather to pay the ransom.

programme.title: Movie: Lucy
programme.desc: In a world overcome by lawlessness and corruption, an unwilling drug mule develops superhuman abilities when the drug leaks into her system.

programme.title: Movie: Proud Mary
programme.desc: Mary is a professional hit woman for one of Boston's powerful organized crime families, and she's never run into a problem that couldn't be solved at gunpoint, but her life is turned upside down when a hit gone wrong leads her to an orphaned boy.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham's guests include: Mark Ruffalo, David Schwimmer, Nick Mohammed, and Alicia Keys.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Best of Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Revisit the most memorable scenes from Blue Planet II's seven episodes. Highlights include giant trevally that fly out of the water to snatch seabirds in mid-air and the industrious tuskfish who uses a coral anvil to crack open his clams.

programme.title: The Making of Planet Earth
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of 'Planet Earth' and inside the massive project to create the epic 11-part series.

programme.desc: Investigating a notorious Egyptian Pharaoh could re-write the Bible as we know it. Ramy Romany tracks down the 3,000 year-old clues that Moses, the prophet of Judaism, Christianity and Islam, was actually the desecrated mummy of King Akhenaten.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped: Stolen Fortune of the Pirate Mummy
programme.desc: A mummy recovered at the bottom of the Atlantic has led treasure hunters to $120 million in gold and jewels stolen by infamous pirate Black Sam. Ramy Romany dives the frigid waters to investigate what might be the greatest heist of all time.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: What on Earth?: World's Deadliest Threats
programme.desc: The world's most dangerous threats are in top-secret locations all over the planet, and using cutting-edge technology, experts reveal the truth behind these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom
programme.desc: Mike Barratt, an astronaut with NASA, explains the strange rings on the world's oldest lake that were photographed from the International Space Station. Since then, more rings have been seen and they continue to baffle scientists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New discoveries lead investigators to a crypt rumored to hold the Ark of the Covenant. When great white shark is killed, experts suspect a mysterious ocean monster. Strange markings in the desert might be a tribute to an ancient spider god.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Fang Forest
programme.desc: A strange forest of razor-sharp stones could be home of an undiscovered Hobbit-like humanoid species. When a man-made island mysteriously appears off the US coast, grisly new evidence points to secret government experiments into psycho-chemical warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chernobyl's Nuclear Monsters
programme.desc: Strange circles of reindeer appear in the remote tundra of Sweden, experts investigate if this mysterious event could be evidence of fatal aftershocks from the Chernobyl nuclear disaster.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Illuminati
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the mysterious group known as 'The Illuminati,' and where they operate from. Find out if they are really some secret world government operating in the shadows, or if they're just one huge conspiracy.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Murder in Unit 14
programme.desc: An inmate collapses and dies from multiple stab wounds after an altercation inside the cellblock.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Kevin/ Jason

programme.title: Why I Ran: Betty/ Josh
programme.desc: Police chase a woman suffering from mental illness across state lines.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Amanda/ Steven
programme.desc: A registered nurse and mother of five panics when police try to pull her over for unpaid traffic tickets; a man under the influence steals a car.

programme.desc: Civil Rights Attorney Benjamin Crump recruits a team of experts, friends and relatives to investigate the murder of Tupac Shakur.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Crips vs. Bloods

programme.title: The Big House: Florida State at Raiford

programme.title: The Big House: Central Prison

programme.title: The Big House: The Lewisburg Federal
programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: There's a New FTO in Town

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Command Presence
programme.desc: Amy has issues with German Shepherds and being attacked by a K-9 is part of training.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: The Birth of a Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie Denny Cooper's father-in-law questions his decision to join the police when his wife is about to give birth and Dennis is off restraining a husband after a hit-and-run. Rookie Hugh Herndon begins on the wild streets of Tampa.

programme.title: Escaping Evil: My Life in a Cult: Pilot
programme.desc: Leslie Wagner-Wilson spent her formative years as a member of the People's Temple under the guidance of Jim Jones. When the church uproots amidst scandal and settles in Guyana, Leslie is convinced to follow.

programme.title: Escaping Evil: My Life in a Cult
programme.desc: Flora Jessop was born at the bottom of an oppressive hierarchy established by the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, or the FLDS. Growing up in Colorado City, Arizona, she suffered greatly at the hands of her father.

programme.title: Bad Romance: An ID Valentine's Day Event
programme.desc: A woman's landlord sends her abusive ex-husband packing at the barrel of a gun but when he returns things turn deadly.

programme.title: Bad Romance: An ID Valentine's Day Event
programme.desc: After a recent break up takes its toll on a young college student, a handsome man enters her life.

programme.title: Bad Romance: An ID Valentine's Day Event

programme.title: Bad Romance: An ID Valentine's Day Event
programme.desc: A single mother finds the man of her dreams online but when they meet in real life it becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: A Fatal Fling
programme.desc: When Joan Bent catches her husband and their tenant in less than desirable circumstances, her life is thrown into shambles. She is later found murdered, and police have no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: My Bloody Valentine
programme.desc: Valentine's Day 2003 in southern Indiana takes a dark turn when the body of a well-to-do man is found dead in his own tasteful suburban home. With no sign of robbery, it's clear to police this murder was personal.

programme.title: Vanished on Valentine's Day
programme.desc: A pregnant college student disappears on Valentine's Day in 2014, setting off a manic police hunt that leads them to key surveillance footage.

programme.title: A Fatal Fling
programme.desc: When Joan Bent catches her husband and their tenant in less than desirable circumstances, her life is thrown into shambles. She is later found murdered, and police have no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: History of Violence
programme.desc: 50-year-old Edwardyne Williams' body is discovered in the woods and at first it appears to be a random act of violence. But as police dig deeper, they discover that the killer is someone who has been harboring a grudge against her for years.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder On The Home Front
programme.desc: When 25 year old veteran Brandon Horst is found with a bullet through his head, it looks like the fallen hero has succumbed to PTSD. But when the case is revealed to be a homicide, police must untangle a vicious conspiracy that hits close to home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Millionaire, the Model and the Hit Man
programme.desc: A millionaire was willing to shell out $80,000 to have someone kill his model wife. Investigators discover that the man was cheating on his wife and tries to hire a hit man because he was not winning his divorce.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Bad Boy
programme.desc: A young mom vanishes after visiting her ex-husband and his 'butt dial' call to 911 may hold clues to her disappearance.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sophia's Secret
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox's relationship with her high-school boyfriend Adam Shigwadja had become so abusive that he had been arrested once for threatening her with a knife. But nothing the court could do to separate them worked...until all hell broke loose.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: My Name is Denise
programme.desc: In North Port, Florida, police receive a call that a young mother has gone missing from her home. In an effort to find her, detectives follow a trail of incoming 911 calls that reveal a heartbreaking story more horrific than they could have ever imagined.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Missing Half
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio, a young mother goes missing after attending a party late one evening. As her whereabouts remain unknown for days, the missing woman's identical twin is convinced there is something deeply sinister at play.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Enter Frame Left
programme.desc: When a young woman in Overland Park, Kansas disappears after a visit to the mall, investigators examine store surveillance footage and uncover a shocking abduction. Days later, the missing woman is found dead in the woods, exposing a horrific tragedy.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Prints of Darkness
programme.desc: When Michael and Melisa Augustson move to little Alma, Georgia they're soon taken in by the community. But on December 14th, Michael comes home to a scene of unspeakable horror. His wife has been murdered, and only one person in the town knows why.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Message in Red
programme.desc: When a beloved couple is gunned down in the presence of children, a cryptic message scrawled across the home leads police to suspect the crime may be drug related. The only problem is, there's no evidence the victims had any involvement in the drug trade.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Answering the Call
programme.desc: When a brush fire is reported in rural Winchester, TN, first responders are horrified to find the body of young Megan Sharpton at the center of the blaze.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Last Face She Saw
programme.desc: When the most popular pizza restaurant of little Claypool Hill, VA is turned into a horrific crime scene, everybody is stunned. With clues revealing more than robbery, law enforcement know they must move fast to catch the killer.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fetch a Hooker
programme.desc: Lane Slettvet, a muscle man for a drug dealer, liked to test fate. One night on a job to pick up a prostitute, Slettvet stabs a man. He tries to stay under the radar, but still goes to parties for the drugs.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Two Homes in Mexico
programme.desc: Gonzolo Martinez is a 17-year old gang member, sentenced to 48 years in prison. A chance arises, and Martinez escapes to Mexico and becomes a drug dealer. Only when Martinez tries to cross the border, do the feds get their chance to capture him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Get Revenge
programme.desc: Scott Eizember has a temper and a history of abuse. So when his girlfriend dumps him, Scott wants revenge. He goes on a violent spree, but is injured during his pursuit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Gun Made of Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Kerry Silvers was facing 55 years in the slammer for robbery and battery, so he decided to escape. Along with two other prisoners they overpowered a few guards and were able to calmly walk out of prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught by a Cougar
programme.desc: Robert Spencer has just shot his girlfriend. He is a thug and drug dealer, who in a blind panic gets high and goes on the run, living every day as a party. He finds the affection of a friend's mother, which ultimately leads to his arrest.

programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.desc: Jeff restores a kitchen and living room in a 1760 farmhouse for Tracey and Scott, who now use it as a guest house. The house was the original structure on their farm, which now contains a newer main house and several outbuildings.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1684 Basement Gut Job
programme.desc: Jeff heads to Aston, PA, to restore the basement of one of the oldest houses in the area. The owners want to use the space for entertaining, so Jeff creates two bar areas, a sitting area, and restores an adjacent space to make a mudroom and entryway.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Classic Colonial Parlor
programme.desc: An 1800s Center Colonial farmhouse addition to a 1760 stone home is turned into a classic parlor with a bar area and a billiards room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1729 Kitchen and Living Room Addition
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin heads to a 1729 home to look at the kitchen and living room additions. He brings in reclaimed barn beams to create a threshold in between the rooms, adds a unique blend of rustic cabinetry and makes a coffee table out of a surprise piece.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Crumbling 1740s Structure
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin is recruited by Steve and his son Ellis to take on the original 1740s section of their home in Bucks County, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1760 Master Suite
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin takes on a dated master suite in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. Kim and Rob's 18th century house was damaged by a fire and last renovated in the 1980s.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Master Suite in a Barn
programme.desc: John and Tina own a converted 1740s barn and they need help with their awkward master bedroom and bath.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1817 Chopped-Up Kitchen
programme.desc: Brandon, the owner of an 1817 stone house, needs help with his kitchen. The kitchen was converted from a side porch in the 1970s, but the strange layout and the materials don't match the rest of the house.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Match.Com
programme.desc: Love is in the air as four bakers battle for the chance to bring their cupcakes to one of Match.com's exclusive Stir Events in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcake Love Story
programme.desc: Four bakers compete for their cupcakes to take centre stage at a VIP party for the biggest stars of opera.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Four cupcake bakers battle to have their creations displayed at a romantic wine tasting.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Splatter Up!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the nine young bakers to get creative and colourful. Cakes in assigned flavours like chocolate, red velvet and coconut are splattered with colour.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Desserts to the Rescue!
programme.desc: Valerie and Duff challenge the eight bakers to defend bird island or pig island in this round inspired by the "Angry Birds 2" movie. Each baker makes a dozen cupcakes based on a character from the film, then they team up to build an edible island.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: I Doughnut Know What to Think!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman ask the seven young bakers to make a giant doughnut cake. Using Bundt cake pans, the bakers make a cake in an assigned flavour like strawberry or maple and then decorate it to look like an oversized doughnut.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: International Intrigue
programme.desc: The six young bakers must fake it to make it as Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge them to create imposters that look like international dishes, such as sushi or shish kebab, but taste like dessert.

programme.title: Winner Cake All: It's a Broadway Princess Party
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis welcomes four top baking teams and challenges them to create a cake decoration that honors their favorite fairy tale. One team is sent home without a happily ever after.

programme.desc: Valerie and Duff challenge the eight bakers to defend bird island or pig island in this round inspired by the "Angry Birds 2" movie. Each baker makes a dozen cupcakes based on a character from the film, then they team up to build an edible island.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Global Goodies
programme.desc: The world gets a little smaller when host Alfonso Ribeiro shares the secrets behind globally-inspired goodies. See how Jarlsberg cheese gets its holes and why the Idaho Candy Company made a confection shaped like a potato.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: It's A Rainbow
programme.desc: It's a kaleidoscope of color as Alfonso Ribeiro finds out how RW Garcia make their tortilla chips so vibrantly red. Then it's off to Amy's Kitchen for their multicolored, palate-pleasing Thai Red Curry Bowl.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet Sensations
programme.desc: Algonso gets a sweet sensation from treats like the iconic Sugar Daddy, colorful Warheads Chewy Cubes, and the luscious Milk Chocolate with Caramel Squares from Ghirardelli.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Freaky Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso highlights snacks with some freaky flavors! From Upton's Naturals Bacon Seitan to the Smoked Nib Brittle from Olive and Sinclair, to Trolli Sour Brite Crawlers, these curious treats are good eats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Pop Stars
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores some treats with serious pop. He'll pop the top of a Snapple Kiwi Strawberry beverage, pop a bubble with the classic Big League Chew shredded bubblegum, and get the inside scoop at Pez.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Little Bits
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor like the colorful Carousel gumballs at Ford Gum, Ghirardelli Chocolate's decadent semi-sweet Baking Chips and the tasty Duchess Gem Donuts from Carolina Foods.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers
programme.desc: The deceptively simple ground meat served on a bun with the perfect combo of condiments and garnishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Saucy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking scours the U.S. to find 15 of the best dishes that are all about the sauce. There's sticky toffee pudding, super spicy wings, a fondue burger, drunken scallops and even chocolate plus barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy Contraptions
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes from the west coast to east coast to check out crazy contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heating It Up In Hawaii
programme.desc: Things are heating up in Hawaii which inspires Roger Mooking to do some island-hopping for the best eats. On Oahu, Hawaii, Roger and farmer Daniel Anthony heat up an imu, a traditional underground oven, for a feast of cheeseburgers.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens
programme.desc: Roger Mooking tames the flames in outdoor kitchens fueled by wood-burning fires. In Solvang, Calif., the Alisal Guest Ranch and Resort is home to 10,000 acres of land with horses, cattle and a bevy of fiery cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cali Cookout
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets San Francisco-based chef Thomas McNaughton at a farm in Healdsburg, Calif., for a live-fire feast of epic proportions. They affix a whole pig to a metal cross to cook over hot coals for several hours.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rad Rigs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is on the hunt for the most radical barbecue rigs, and he starts at The Pit Room in Houston, Texas, where special events call for a custom-built trailer that can cook up to 600 pounds of meat.

programme.title: Good Eats: True Brew
programme.desc: Alton leads viewers through the history and preparation of America's favourite beverage, coffee.

programme.title: Good Eats: Ear Apparent

programme.desc: Ray has trusted Henry and Charlotte with protecting Swellview while he's out of town at his cousin's wedding. Problems arise when they find themselves having to handle things on their own.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Octo-Charlotte/ Trouble in Tropikini
programme.desc: Schwoz accidentally morphs Charlotte into half girl/ half octopus, Captain Man and Kid Danger work to change her back but first they must catch her. The group's vacation is cut short when Jasper falls into a volcano and is held captive by the Volcaniacs.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Sushi Sitter/ Cheer Beast
programme.desc: Captain Man must save Kid Danger from Drillfinger with the only tool he has: a motorized toilet.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Clone Babies/ Flying Spiders
programme.desc: Feeling that being Captain Man is too much work for just one person, Ray and Schwoz hatch the perfect plan: clone Ray.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Mama Drama/ Ballet Boys
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany learn parenting isn't easy when they have to care for a robot baby for a school assignment.When Alvin's soccer team struggles, the coach makes the team learn ballet to help with their conditioning.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: World Day/ Between a Rope and a Hard Place
programme.desc: To celebrate 'World Day' and win a trip, the Chipmunks each get a country to represent for a school presentation. Then, Coach Dobkins kicks Cheesy and Theodore off the track team for being slow, but Theodore is determined to compete.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: 3, 2, 1/ Shirley Keeper
programme.desc: It's the day of the big rocket launch, and the entire city has Mars launch fever.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Cubs and Robbers/ Billy the Bug
programme.desc: A movie promotion stunt goes wrong, unleashing a humongous ‘Cubby the Cop’ balloon on the city. Then, Fire Chief McCloud accidently buys a malfunctioning Twirly Hat for her nephew.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: To the Extreme!
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic and extra dangerous.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Something's Fishy/ Presto Chang-O
programme.desc: Timmy is at the beach and he's bored silly. Wanting to go diving, he wishes to become a fish; Timmy hasn't studied for a test in Mr. Crocker's class so he wishes for a device that allows him to change places with anyone who comes in contact with it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Man's Worst Friend
programme.desc: In order to make Timmy and his family miserable, Foop replaces Sparky with the Anti-Sparky. When that plan works, Foop decides to make all of Dimmsdale unhappy be replacing everyone's pet with an evil pet.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Many Unhappy Returns
programme.desc: The TMNT must stop a persistent foe from shredding NYC, but problems arise when they split up to handle things.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mystic Mayhem
programme.desc: The Turtles discover for the first time that they’re not the weirdest things in New York.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Crash and Burnout
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: A Steep Price To Pay
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fangceanera
programme.desc: Mavis is turning 115, so it's time for her Fangceanera. This vampire rite of passage means that she'll finally earn her Dracula cape. In order to do that, however, she must complete a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Pokémon: XY: From A to Z!
programme.desc: Bonnie makes a new friend, Ash runs into an old friend, and a terrifying premonition begins to unfold.

programme.title: Pokémon: XY: Meeting at Terminus Cave!
programme.desc: Our heroes are visiting Terminus Cave with hopes of seeing new Pokémon, but they're not alone.

programme.title: Pokémon: XY: A Cellular Connection!
programme.desc: A courageous rescue during our heroes’ search for Squishy leaves one of their friends in danger.

programme.title: Pokémon: XY: An Explosive Operation!
programme.desc: As Team Flare continues to advance Operation Z, they get help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Pokémon: XY: A Towering Takeover
programme.desc: Lysandre and Team Flare are attempting to take over Lumiose City and the world, and our heroes are in the middle of the chaos.

programme.title: Pokémon: XY: Coming Apart at the Dreams!
programme.desc: Lumiose City is on the verge of ruin, but our heroes and their friends are not about to stand by and do nothing.

programme.title: Pokémon: XY: The Right Hero for the Right Job!
programme.desc: The fate of Kalos and the world depends on the outcome of Team Flare's plans and our heroes are doing their best to stop them.

programme.title: Pokémon: XY: Rocking Kalos Defenses!
programme.desc: A very powerful group has the power to control the fate of Chespie and the whole world.

programme.title: Pokémon: XY: Forming a More Perfect Union
programme.desc: The moment of truth has arrived, as our heroes and their friends must face the final challenge that will decide the fate of the world.

programme.title: Pokémon: XY: The Legend of X, Y and Z!
programme.desc: A trip to some newly discovered ruins in Kalos reveals a rich history of compassion and caring from three Legendary Pokémon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Enter the Champion!
programme.desc: The Alola Pokémon League is down to the final moments of the final battle.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Z-Move Showdown!
programme.desc: Although the Alola Pokémon League is over, a new type of excitement is just beginning!

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Exhibition Unmasked!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: A Full Battle Bounty!
programme.desc: In the air or on the ground, the Alola Pokémon League’s exhibition match between Ash and Professor Kukui is roaring along!

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs Fafnir!
Yo-Kai Watch: Yo-Kai Lazy Sundae/ Yo-Kai Flushback / Komasan Cab: Dracunyan
programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Fiery Surprises!
DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Christmas
programme.desc: Cricket becomes worried that he's not on Santa's 'Nice List' so he goes on a spree of good deeds. Gramma and Nancy go on a last minute search for Bill's gift.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: New Orleans
programme.desc: Nate experiences the city's continued post-Katrina rebirth through some of its most iconic dining establishments, and witnesses the economic and opportunity struggles that still exist. The integration in the Superdome also takes center stage.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: Cleveland
programme.desc: A local restaurateur guides Nate through the resurgent city as he explores a social-minded culinary school and the revitalization of a local high school football field. An exploration of second chances, working class struggle and community policing.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: New York
programme.desc: A slam poet takes Nate to a special school that infuses music and scientific learning, and a Harlem barber fights gentrification with a unique entrepreneurial approach. Players from the Giants and Jets combat homelessness and inequality.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: Miami
programme.desc: Nate joins a Miami Dolphin to explore police outreach in the community, and dives with military vets to examine an effort to save coral reefs. The long season's journey concludes at the site of Super Bowl LIV.

programme.title: Movie: Boyz 'N the Hood
programme.desc: A coming-of-age film about Tre, a bright teenager who is sent to live with his father when his mother feels he needs a male role model. Tre's father guides him to choose the smartest path when he becomes torn between gang life and attending college.

programme.title: Movie: Mile 22
programme.desc: When a local government agent defects from his Southeast Asian country and claims to have information about a pending attack by his government on the United States, an elite CIA agent is sent in to retrieve him and get him out of the country.

programme.title: Movie: American Gangster
programme.desc: A detective in 1970s America works to bring down the drug empire of Frank Lucas. The kingpin from Manhattan is smuggling the drug into the country from the Far East.

programme.title: Outlander: The Gathering
programme.desc: As the Castle prepares for The Gathering, Claire plots her escape. But after a dangerous encounter with a drunken Dougal and an unexpected run-in with Jamie, her plans are dashed.

programme.title: Outlander: Rent
programme.desc: Claire joins the MacKenzie rent-collecting trip. To her horror, Dougal uses Jamie's scars to gain sympathy for the Jacobite cause. Claire recalls that a defining moment in Scottish history is fast approaching.

programme.title: Outlander: The Garrison Commander
programme.desc: Claire's unexpected meeting with a British general turns tense when Captain Jack Randall arrives. Claire finds herself alone with Randall, a dangerous man determined to uncover her secrets.

programme.title: Outlander: The Wedding
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.title: Outlander: Both Sides Now
programme.desc: Frank desperately searches for his missing wife, while Claire tries to come to terms with her new marriage. Claire is faced with an emotional quandary as a life-altering opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Outlander: The Reckoning
programme.desc: Jamie and the Highlanders rescue Claire from Black Jack Randall. Back at the castle, politics threaten to tear Clan McKenzie apart and Jamie's scorned lover, Laoghaire, attempts to win him back.

programme.title: Outlander: By the Pricking of My Thumbs
programme.desc: Jamie hopes the newly arrived Duke of Sandringham will help lift the price from his head, while Claire attempts to save an abandoned child.

programme.title: Outlander: The Devil's Mark
programme.desc: Claire and Geillis are on trial for witchcraft. Jamie manages to rescue Claire, but not before she discovers a secret about Geillis's past.

programme.title: Outlander: Lallybroch
programme.desc: Reunited, Claire and Jamie make their way to Lallybroch, Jamie's family home. Reality quickly sets in, and old wounds are reopened between Jamie and his sister, Jenny.

programme.title: Outlander: The Watch
programme.desc: Jamie finds himself between a rock and a hard place when a redcoat deserter from his past resurfaces. Claire tends to a laboring Jenny while Jamie and Ian join The Watch, resulting in devastating consequences.

programme.title: Outlander: The Search
programme.desc: Claire and Jenny set out to rescue Jamie from his redcoat captors. When Murtagh joins up, they turn to unorthodox tactics to send word to Jamie. When word finally arrives, the news isn't what anyone had hoped.

programme.title: Outlander: Wentworth Prison
programme.desc: Jamie awaits his death sentence at Wentworth Prison, while Claire and the Highlanders search for a rescue plan. When Jamie is visited by Black Jack, he realizes there is a fate worse than death.

programme.title: Outlander: To Ransom a Man's Soul
programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jamie, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.title: Outlander: Through a Glass, Darkly
programme.desc: Returning to her own time, Claire must reconcile her future with the life she left behind. Shifting back to 18th century, Jamie, Claire and Murtagh arrive in France, but learn that Paris presents its own challenges.

programme.title: Outlander: Not in Scotland Anymore
programme.desc: Life in Paris is not without its trials as Jamie struggles to triumph over his past. A fortunate meeting with Prince Charles presents opportunities, while the Duke of Sandringham's presence brings complications.

programme.title: Outlander: Useful Occupations and Deceptions
programme.desc: Jamie's days and nights are dominated by political machinations, while Claire finds solace in her healing skills. As their plan to stop Culloden progresses, the past threatens to derail their forward momentum.

programme.title: Outlander: La Dame Blanche
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie throw a dinner party to derail investors inPrince Charles' war effort. Meanwhile, Claire's revelationthat Jack Randall is alive sparks Jamie in an unexpectedway as he and Claire struggle.

programme.title: Outlander: Untimely Resurrection
programme.desc: Reunited, Jamie and Claire attempt to extinguish the fires, however, Claire is set off on an unexpected change of course. Jamie and Claire's relationship is put to the ultimate test when the past rears its ugly head.

programme.title: Outlander: Best Laid Schemes...
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire use Claire's medical knowledge to devise a scheme to stop a deal which could fill the war chest. When Claire learns Jamie has gone back on his word, the couple is met with dire consequences.

programme.title: Outlander: Faith
programme.desc: Claire is brought to L'Hopital Des Anges where doctors try to save her life and that of her unborn baby. King Louis asks Claire to judge two men accused of practicing the dark arts - one an enemy, one a friend.

programme.title: Outlander: The Fox's Lair
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie call upon Jamie's grandsire, Lord Lovat, in an attempt to elicit support. However, a visiting Colum MacKenzie has other plans, and Lord Lovat's manipulations ensure that his own interests will be served.

programme.title: Outlander: Je Suis Prest
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men as they train. Jamie's power struggle and Claire's personal battle weigh upon them, but new information comes when an Englishman pays a visit to their camp.

programme.title: Outlander: Prestonpans
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of 'history', Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition. Meanwhile, Claire attends to the dead and dying, a reminder of the truest cost of war.

programme.title: Outlander: Vengeance Is Mine
programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.

programme.title: Outlander: The Hail Mary
programme.desc: As Jamie puts all of his efforts into turning the Jacobite army away from the impending slaughter, Claire attempts to comfort the sick Alex Randall. Alex reveals an outrageous plan to save the mother of his child.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.: A Little Bit of Luck, A Little Bit of Grief
programme.desc: T.C. and Magnum fight to save T.C.'s clubhouse for troubled kids.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.: Photo Play

programme.title: The Game: Missed You, Kelly Pitts

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Pilot
programme.desc: Mike plays Cupid for Mandy by setting her up on a blind date with one of his employees who he thinks would be perfect for her, but Mike's set-up gets off track when Kyle accidentally meets Kristin.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Tiffany Haddish, Louie Anderson, Bill Bellamy, Jodi Miller, and Gabriel Iglesias.

programme.desc: A marriage is at stake because a woman suspects her husband is cheating with two women, she claims are his 'side chicks'.

programme.desc: Nephew blames aunt for additional funeral expenses; A camera is damaged on a basketball court.

programme.desc: A man claims a fellow barber bad-mouthed him and stole his clients; a woman claims her late grandmother’s photograph was used without compensation.
